title: Keep Every Extra Penny Act of 2025
short_title: Keep Every Extra Penny Act of 2025
stage_label: Referred to the House Committee on Ways and Means.
crs_summary: Keep Every Extra Penny Act of 2025 This bill excludes from gross income for federal income tax purposes overtime compensation paid for hours worked in excess of 40 hours per week (as required by the Fair Labor Standards Act of 1938). Under current law, overtime compensation paid to a taxpayer is included in gross income for purposes of calculating federal income taxes.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on Ways and Means.
